scripts.dev: npm run bootstrap && concurrently --kill-others-on-fail "npm run dev:mongo" "npm run dev:backend" "npm run dev:frontend"
scripts.dev:mongo: powershell -NoProfile -ExecutionPolicy Bypass -Command "$name='movie-library-mongo'; $exists=docker ps -a --format '{{.Names}}' | Select-String -SimpleMatch $name; if($exists){ docker start $name } else { docker run -d --name $name -p 27017:27017 mongo:8 }"
scripts.dev:backend: powershell -NoProfile -ExecutionPolicy Bypass -Command "$listener=Get-NetTCPConnection -LocalPort 5263 -State Listen -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue; if($listener){ Write-Host 'Backend already running on port 5263, reusing existing process.'; exit 0 } else { dotnet run --project backend/MovieLibrary.Api/MovieLibrary.Api.csproj }"
